title: Review of speed estimation algorithms for three- phase induction motor
author: Elbarbary, Al-Harbi, et al.
description: Review Highlights‚ÄĘThe algorithms to study the methodology for different methods of speed estimation in induction motor drives.‚ÄĘMerits and drawbacks of each sensorless speed estimation technique.‚ÄĘDetailed comparison between different sensorless speed estimation methods.

steps_raw.title: Direct calculation method
steps_raw.instruction: Its simplicity and quick computational time distinguish the direct calculation approach of speed estimation for induction motors. the procedure of rotor flux estimation is the essential component of a speed estimation scheme [33,66,71,72].
